title: Gift Guide for Creatives + Kids
excerpt: Had so much fun putting together this little gift guide and then realized there are just so many wonderful things that I left out. One of them being that it's always the thought that counts and another gift I am…
body:
Had so much fun putting together this little gift guide and then realized there are just so many wonderful things that I left out. One of them being that it's always the thought that counts and another gift I am asking for this year once again is the gift of presence. We have 20+ people who will be with us for Christmas this year (yay!) and have decided to ask everyone to not worry or stress about gift giving. Here's the video I put together and don't forget the awesome discount codes provided by a couple of the brands - details below!

Everything is listed in the description box of the video, but here are some I wanted to highlight:

Mastering Hand Lettering | Lettering in the Whimsical Woodlands | Art Deco Lettering Cards | 
Tombow VIP Club | Choose ToDo Planner Cover - Inner Beauty - 15% off code: ChooseTangerine
Petit Collage - 20% off code: amytangerine | Instax SQ10 Camera | HP Sprocket 2-in-1 | Daymaker
